intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-mcs-category against el10 policyvers 35. MCS category mismatch (container_t s0:c0 reading container_file_t s0:c5). Verifies Constraint bucket is stable across policy versions for MCS category scenarios.

oracle.audit2why_detail: mlsconstrain file { ioctl read lock execute execute_no_trans } ((h1 dom h2 -Fail-) or (t1 != mcs_constrained_type -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED. Possible cause is the source level (s0:c0) and target level (s0:c5) are different.

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: MCS category mismatch: source category set {c0} does not dominate target category set {c5}. A TE allow cannot fix an MCS constraint.
